commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in environment substitution for raw plugin runtime configs, preserves prepared-config escape semantics, and adds runtime and gateway regression tests.

PR surface: Source +29, Tests +212. Total +241 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the current-head substitution condition requires `resolveRawConfigEnvVars: true`, while no production caller supplies it, so the proposed fix cannot affect normal runtime loads.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blocking defect is concrete, but repair must first locate and verify the canonical production raw-config owner rather than blindly enabling the flag on prepared paths.
